assertion_results.assertion: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 22-30: 'Source Repositories (with Deployment Context)' section shows a parsed table with rhtpa-backend mapped to 'customer-shipped'. Line 30 confirms: 'The Deployment Context column is present in the Source Repositories table. The repository rhtpa-backend is mapped to deployment context customer-shipped.'

assertion_results.assertion: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 74-82: 'Deployment Context Lookup' section identifies rhtpa-backend from the component label and records 'Deployment Context: customer-shipped'. Line 82 states: 'This deployment context is recorded as part of the CVE metadata and will be used in Step 8 (Remediation) to generate coordination guidance in remediation task descriptions.'

assertion_results.assertion: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md: Both Task 1 (line 71 '### Coordination Guidance' under '## Implementation Notes') and Task 2 (line 160 '### Coordination Guidance' under '## Implementation Notes') include the subsection with customer-shipped guidance: 'This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.'

assertion_results.assertion: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 73 and 162: 'This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.' All three elements explicitly mentioned.
